arts.ttl: The key quotes from Glasner's pre-Brighton press conference
arts.sum: Crystal Palace visit rivals Brighton & Hove Albion on Sunday afternoon (14:00 GMT), aiming to make it five Premier League games unbeaten in-a-row. Here's what manager Oliver Glasner had to say ahead of the game below.

arts.ttl: Brighton vs Crystal Palace: Public protection order means alcohol can seized outside licensed premises
arts.sum: A public protection order will mean that alcohol can be seized outside licensed premises in Brighton on Sunday – when Albion face rivals Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Brighton demand club change crest – Too similar to Seagulls’ own, strange situation
arts.sum: Jadran means Adriatic in Croatian. Galeb means seagull. Therefore, NK Jadran Galeb are the Adriatic Seagulls. However, they’re nowhere near the Adriatic Sea, and instead the club was formed when teams from two Croatian villages, Kuzminec and Koledinec, merged in 2011. What has any of this got to do with Brighton & Hove Albion? Well, The post Brighton demand club change crest – Too similar to Seagulls’ own, strange situation appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Palace team news: Veltman to be assessed
arts.sum: Since the start of last season, only Brentford (38) have both scored and conceded in more Premier League matches than Brighton and Hove Albion (37), with the Seagulls doing so in 10 of their last 11 games, including each of their last seven. Fabian Hurzeler experienced the Albion-Palace rivalry with our fans at Selhurst Park last season.
